resources.string: Friends page temporarily simplified for build stability.
Timeline page temporarily simplified for build stability.
Notifications page temporarily simplified for build stability.
Data sovereignty for individuals · AI at hand
Type a message or hold to talk…
Manage encryption keys and DID identities
Free space used by temporary files
Are you sure you want to clear all cached data? This won\'t affect your personal data.
Enter PC signaling server address. Format: ws://IP:port
Please select a device in Device Management first
Monitor PC system status in real time
Connect to PC desktop and control remotely
Transfer files between PC and Android

Sync clipboard between PC and Android
View detailed connection status and reconnect settings
Hello! I\'m your AI assistant. How can I help you?
Help me analyze this project\'s architecture
I\'ve analyzed your project architecture. It follows a typical MVVM design…
I\'ve received your file and am analyzing it…
Are you sure you want to clear all conversation content? This cannot be undone.
Connection failed. Please check API key and network
No services found. Tap refresh to scan

Connection failed. Please check:
1. Ollama is running on PC
2. Firewall allows port 11434
3. Network connection is ok

1. Ensure Ollama is running on PC
2. Phone and PC on the same LAN
3. Tap the WiFi icon to auto-discover
4. Or manually enter PC's IP address
Visit platform.openai.com to register and create an API key
Visit platform.deepseek.com to register and create an API key
Visit console.anthropic.com to register and create an API key
Visit ai.google.dev to get an API key
Visit dashscope.aliyun.com to activate service and get API-KEY
Visit console.bce.baidu.com/qianfan to create app and get key
Visit open.bigmodel.cn to register and create API key
Visit platform.moonshot.cn to register and get API key
Visit console.xfyun.cn to create app and get key
Visit console.volcengine.com/ark to activate and get API key
No API key needed. Install Ollama on your PC and run it.
Enter an OpenAI-compatible API endpoint and key
Please log in before creating a project
Tap the button below to scan for new devices
Tap the button below to start scanning
Are you sure you want to disconnect from \"%s\"?\n\nThis will delete the encrypted session. You will need to pair again to reconnect.
Are you sure you want to log out? This will clear all local data.
Personal second brain with RAG-enhanced search
DID-based identity authentication and P2P encrypted messaging
Digital asset management and smart contracts
Learn AI painting from scratch with Stable Diffusion and Midjourney
In-depth review of market trends and investment opportunities this year
Professional photographer shares portrait photo color grading secrets
Scientific learning methods to help you achieve more with less effort
Discover hidden gem restaurants in the city
The most popular UI design styles and techniques this year
A complete tutorial on data analysis with Python
How to take great portrait photos indoors
How to create a knowledge base?
Tap \"Knowledge Base\" on the home page, then tap the \"+\" button at the top right to create a new entry. Supports text, documents and more.
Go to \"Profile\" \u003e \"AI Configuration\", select an LLM provider (e.g. Doubao/OpenAI/Ollama), and enter the API key. We recommend using \"AI Test\" to verify the connection first.
What to do if P2P device connection fails?
Make sure both devices are on the same network and check firewall settings to allow P2P communication. For remote connections, ensure the signaling server is reachable.
Go to \"Settings\" \u003e \"Data Management\" to export personal data. The app uses SQLCipher encrypted storage and data is saved in the app\'s private directory by default.
The app uses AES-256 encrypted database and supports PIN and biometric unlock. P2P communication uses Signal protocol for end-to-end encryption, with identity based on decentralized DID.
Learn the core features and basic operations of ChainlessChain
Master multi-model configuration, prompt optimization and token management
Configure P2P connections for cross-device collaboration and remote control
Learn about encryption mechanisms, DID identity and key management
Please describe the issue or your suggestion:
Thank you for your feedback! We will process it as soon as possible.
API key for %1$s is not configured. Please set it in AI Settings first.
Configure LLM providers and API keys
